parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded footage (the woman on the right) with AI-generated elements. The avatar on the left exhibits uncanny smoothness, glowing facial lines, and slightly unnatural, repetitive movements typical of AI generation. The opening clip of the brain being cut also appears to be a 3D render or AI-generated due to the unnatural smoke physics and texture.

characters.appearance: Young female with a fair complexion and brown hair styled in a bob. She has large, expressive brown eyes and glowing, animated blue lines running vertically down her cheeks.
characters.wardrobe: A metallic, shiny gold or bronze hooded jacket.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and slightly artificial in her movements.

characters.appearance: Young Indian female with a medium complexion and dark, shoulder-length hair. She has dark eyes and a natural, everyday look.
characters.wardrobe: A simple, light grey sleeveless tank top.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, initially hesitant but becomes eager and interested.

scenes.setting: A rustic wooden workbench, daytime, warm and moody lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a wooden workbench covered in wood shavings and various carving tools. In the center sits a translucent, pinkish, brain-shaped object. A hand holding a dark, rustic-looking knife presses down on the object, slicing into it. As the knife cuts, thick white smoke or steam billows out from the incision. The lighting is natural and slightly moody, highlighting the texture of the brain object and the smoke.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up shot of a knife cutting into a translucent, brain-shaped object on a wooden workbench. Smoke billows from the cut. Text overlays pose a question about English proficiency.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker: आपको अंग्रेज़ी समझ आती है, लेकिन बोलना नहीं आता? [Do you understand English, but can't speak it?]
scenes.on_screen_text: आपको अंग्रेज़ी समझ आती है, लेकिन बोलना नहीं आता? (Aapko angrezi samajh aati hai, lekin bolna nahi aata?)

scenes.setting: Indistinct dark backgrounds for both characters.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a medium close-up against a dark, indistinct background. She rests her chin on her hand, looking directly forward with a friendly expression. The lighting highlights the metallic sheen of her jacket and the glowing lines on her face.

Character B is framed in a medium close-up against a plain, dark wall. She looks directly forward, her facial expressions changing as she speaks and listens. The lighting is soft and natural, illuminating her face clearly.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen showing two women having a conversation. The left side features an AI-generated avatar, while the right side shows a real human woman. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, translating their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B: Sorry, मेरी English अच्छी नहीं है। [Sorry, my English is not good.]
Character A: तुम्हे रोज़ practice करनी चाहिए। [You should practice every day.]
Character B: मेरे साथ practice करने वाला कोई नहीं है। [There is no one to practice with me.]
Character A: तुम्हारे लिए मैं हूँ ना? I am Sivi, your AI English tutor. [I am here for you, right? I am Sivi, your AI English tutor.]
Character B: मतलब, मैं तुमसे direct बात कर सकती हूँ? [Meaning, I can talk to you directly?]
Character A: बिल्कुल! मैं तुम्हे instant feedback दूँगी। तुम्हारे pronunciation, grammar, सब कुछ improve करूँगी। और तुम बहुत अच्छी English बोलने लगोगी। [Absolutely! I will give you instant feedback. I will improve your pronunciation, grammar, everything. And you will start speaking very good English.]
Character B: लेकिन तुमसे बात करना महंगा होगा ना? [But talking to you must be expensive, right?]
Character A: बिल्कुल नहीं! Normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Sorry, meri English acchi nahi hai.
Tume roz practice karni chahiye.
Mere saath practice karne wala koi nahi hai.
Tumhare liye main hoon na? I am Sivi, your AI English tutor.
Matlab, main tumse direct baat kar sakti hoon?
Bilkul! Main tumhe instant feedback doongi. Tumhare pronunciation, grammar, sab kuch improve karoongi. Aur tum bahot acchi English bolne lagogi.
Lekin tumse baat karna mehenga hoga na?
Bilkul nahi! Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai.

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital interface displaying a product page. At the top is a square icon next to several lines of text. Below this is a prominent, wide rectangular button. Further down is a video player thumbnail showing a person's face, along with more text sections.

scenes.visual_description: A full-screen view of a mobile app store interface. The screen displays the details of an app, including its name, icon, and a prominent install button. A promotional video thumbnail is visible below the install section.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A: इसलिए 1 करोड़ लोग MySivi पर English practice कर रहे हैं। [That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.]
scenes.on_screen_text:

scenes.visual_description: The video returns to the vertical split-screen format. The AI avatar on the left and the human woman on the right continue their conversation. Subtitles are displayed at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B: लेकिन time नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]
Character A: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 minute practice काफी है। तुम आसानी से confident बन जाओगी। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will easily become confident.]
Character B: Wow! कैसे join करूँ? [Wow! How do I join?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Lekin time nahi milta.
Roz sirf 15 se 20 minute practice kaafi hai. Tum aasaani se confident ban jaogi.
Wow! Kaise join karoon?

You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, start.]
